title: Tilray Brands Completes Accretive Acquisition of HEXO Corp
text: Tilray Brands completed its acquisition of HEXO Corp in June 2023. The acquisition was expected to achieve additional cost savings in excess of US$27 million on an annualized pre-tax basis, driven by synergies across production, sales, marketing, distribution, and corporate savings. The strategic alliance between Tilray Brands and HEXO was expected to deliver up to $80 million of shared cost-saving synergies within two years of completion. Total savings were expected to be a minimum of C$50 million within two years. Tilray Brands shares savings on a 50:50 basis related to facilities optimization, procurement, general and administrative costs, insurance and certain shared services, and certain production and processing activities for straight-edge pre-rolls, edibles and beverages. HEXO optimized their sales, marketing, and distribution networks to strengthen Tilray's commercial footprint and hasten market share growth. After the acquisition, Tilray expanded its leading cannabis market share position in Canada.
